title: Legacy (Old) Cobweb Sounds
description: Brings back the cobweb sounds from before 1.21. Cobwebs should sound like blocks, not leaves!
body: Changes the sound of breaking and placing cobwebs back to what it was before 1.21. The new cobweb sound is like leaves, whereas the old one is like breaking cobblestone. Helpful if you are used to the old one, or just prefer the old one!
